description:
You are a Green Building Designer evaluating a residential concept for passive solar performance. Your goal is to maximize winter heat gain and analyze the results.

1. Open the starter project: ~/Documents/Energy3D/building-passive-heating.ng3
2. Modify the building's envelope: Add at least one new Window (or significantly enlarge an existing one) on the South-facing wall to increase passive solar heating.
3. Set the simulation date to January 15 using the top toolbar date controls.
4. Select the building and run a Daily Energy Analysis (Analysis menu -> Buildings -> Daily Energy Analysis for Selected Building).
5. Once the analysis finishes, export the graph data as a CSV file to ~/Documents/Energy3D/jan15_energy_load.csv.
6. Save the modified 3D model to a new file at ~/Documents/Energy3D/optimized_passive_heating.ng3.
